word: The company's profits increased sevenfold last year.
definition: seven times as much or as many

word: The company's profits increased tenfold last year.
definition: by ten times; consisting of ten parts

word: The company's profits increased threefold last year.
definition: three times as much or as many

word: The national debt is in the trillions.
The benefits of this approach are twofold.
definition: having two parts or elements; double

word: I have a zillion things to do today.
